feature_name: levenshtein(s1, s2, int insdel, int rep, int trans)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, s1 VARCHAR(100), s2 VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, s1, s2) VALUES (1, 'MonetDB', 'DB3');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, s1, s2) VALUES (2, 'Example', 'Sample');
UPDATE test_strings SET s2 = 'TestString' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, levenshtein(s1, s2, 2, 1, 1) AS edit_distance FROM test_strings;
